page_content:
Prerequisite: EDHD475.

Restriction: Must be in the Human Development Honors program.

EDHD488 Special Topics in Human Development (3 Credits)

Special and intensive treatment of current topics and issues in human development.

Prerequisite: EDHD320.

Recommended: PSYC100.

Restriction: Permission of EDUC-Human Development and Quantitative Methodology department.

Repeatable to: 6 credits if content differs.

EDHD489 Field Experiences in Human Development (3-6 Credits) Planned field experience (internship or research-based activities) related to Human Development. Credit not to be granted for experiences accrued prior to registration.
